reviews.comment:
En el bar te atienden excelente, en los boxes está Claudio que es un genio de la vida, trata a tu auto como su fuese el suyo. Los playeros son medios mala onda, no son muy simpáticos, y hasta a veces...

(Translated by Google)
The service at the bar is excellent, and Claudio, who's a real character, works in the pits, treating your car like it's his own. The gas station attendants are kind of unfriendly, not very nice, and sometimes even...

reviews.comment:
Encontrar el baño así no es casualidad, soy cliente habitual y siempre está así de impecable, esto es el resultado del compromiso de los empleados por limpiar y de los clientes por mantenerlo asi. Dejar el baño en las mismas condiciones que se lo encuentra es por respeto a los que trabajan en ese lugar y esta es mí forma de agradecer y destacar su labor. Muchas gracias!!

(Translated by Google)
Finding the bathroom like this isn't by chance; I'm a regular customer and it's always this spotless. This is the result of the employees' commitment to cleaning and the customers' commitment to keeping it that way. Leaving the bathroom in the same condition as I found it is out of respect for those who work there, and this is my way of thanking them and acknowledging their work. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVXzdIWVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio de ACA. El flaco que hace el cambio de aceite y filtros atiende de muy mala gana. Los filtros carisimos y no te avisa que no tiene filtro de nafta si no hasta que ya hizo todo. Con los descuentos de ACA y serviclub no ahorré más de $200. No vuelvo ni de casualidad. No queda otra que ir a la casa central.

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member. The guy who does the oil and filter changes is incredibly unhelpful. The filters are ridiculously expensive, and he doesn't tell you he's out of fuel filters until he's already done everything. Even with the ACA and Serviclub discounts, I didn't save more than $200. I'm never going back. I have no choice but to go to the main branch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVNzc3ZVF3EAE
